mapper.select: SELECT account_id AS id, res_account_name AS title, res_account_start_date AS start_date, res_account_end_date AS end_date, res_rate AS rate, res_valid_period AS period FROM mydata_saving_accounts WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT account_id AS id, res_account_name AS title, res_account_start_date AS start_date, res_account_end_date AS end_date, res_rate AS rate, res_valid_period AS period FROM mydata_saving_accounts WHERE account_id = #{id}

SELECT sp.saving_product_id as id, sp.kor_co_nm as company, sp.fin_prdt_nm AS title, so.intr_rate as base_rate, so.intr_rate2 as max_rate, so.save_trm as period, sp.max_limit as amount FROM saving_product sp JOIN saving_option so ON sp.fin_prdt_cd = so.fin_prdt_cd AND sp.fin_id = so.fin_id WHERE so.save_trm = #{period} AND CAST(so.intr_rate AS DECIMAL(5, 4)) > #{rate} ORDER BY CAST(so.intr_rate AS DECIMAL(5, 4)) DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mydata_saving_accounts (res_account, user_id, fin_id, res_account_status, res_account_display, res_account_name, res_account_nickname, res_account_holder, res_final_round_no, res_account_start_date, res_account_end_date, res_account_balance, res_monthly_payment, res_valid_period, res_type, res_management_branch, res_rate, res_contract_amount, res_payment_methods, res_last_tran_date, comm_start_date, comm_end_date, created_time, last_modified_time) VALUES (#{resAccount}, #{userId}, #{finId}, #{resAccountStatus}, #{resAccountDisplay}, #{resAccountName}, #{resAccountNickName}, #{resAccountHolder}, #{resFinalRoundNo}, #{resAccountStartDate}, #{resAccountEndDate}, #{resAccountBalance}, #{resMonthlyPayment}, #{resValidPeriod}, #{resType}, #{resManagementBranch}, #{resRate}, #{resContractAmount}, #{resPaymentMethods}, #{resLastTranDate}, #{commStartDate}, #{commEndDate}, #{createdTime}, #{lastModifiedTime})

INSERT INTO mydata_user_account (res_account, user_id, fin_id, res_account_balance, res_account_end_date, res_account_nickname, res_account_start_date, res_last_tran_date, res_account_deposit, res_account_name, res_account_display, res_loan_end_date, res_account_currency, res_account_lifetime, res_overdraft_acct_yn, res_loan_kind, res_loan_balance, res_loan_start_date, created_time, last_modified_time) VALUES (#{resAccount}, #{userId}, #{finId}, #{resAccountBalance}, #{resAccountEndDate}, #{resAccountNickname}, #{resAccountStartDate}, #{resLastTranDate}, #{resAccountDeposit}, #{resAccountName}, #{resAccountDisplay}, #{resLoanEndDate}, #{resAccountCurrency}, #{resAccountLifetime}, #{resOverdraftAcctYN}, #{resLoanKind}, #{resLoanBalance}, #{resLoanStartDate}, #{createdTime}, #{lastModifiedTime});
